Notice Of Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Dismissal Filed 12/4/2025
Off Calendar Jun-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DONALD WOODARD's Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Dismissal Filed 12/4/2025

Granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The case is restored to the civil active list.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
